---
title: "FHAB Database Modernized — Tester Guide"
subtitle: "Pilot / Testing"
---

Welcome, and thank you for helping test the new FHAB system. This guide is for **program staff**
and **community volunteers**. Please report anything confusing or broken — see
[Giving feedback](feedback.qmd).

::: {.callout-important}
This is a **test system**. Do not treat anything here as an official advisory or an official
report of record. Test data may be wiped at any time. For a real suspected bloom, still use the
official channels.
:::

::: {.callout-warning title="Data & privacy disclaimer"}
All data in this demonstration and proof of concept is either **open data** (public,
CISO-governed) or **fake / demo** report data.

**Please do not enter any personally identifiable information (PII)** — or anything you suspect
*could* be PII — that could be compromised if disclosed. Treat everything you enter as
potentially visible to others.

When a form asks for an **email address**, use a **work or otherwise publicly available** address,
or one that would **not be a problem if it were leaked to a third party**. Do not use a private or
sensitive personal email.
:::

## Pick your track

- **[Community tester](community.qmd)** — submit a bloom report from the CyanoSafe app, no login
  needed.
- **[Program staff](staff.qmd)** — log in to the FHAB Staff app to review reports, enter data,
  manage cases, and more.

## Systems and links

| System | What it is | Link |
|---|---|---|
| **CyanoSafe map (desktop)** | Public HAB map + "Report a Bloom" form | [Open](https://ggearheart.github.io/CyanoSafe_demo/) |
| **CyanoSafe app (phone / PWA)** | The mobile app most community users will use | [Open](https://ggearheart.github.io/CyanoSafe_phone_demo/) |
| **FHAB Staff app** | Staff workspace (login required) | [Open](https://fhab-web.onrender.com) |

::: {.callout-note}
Your staff login and any community-group API key are provided **separately** — they are not in
this guide.
:::
